tasks.label: clang-tidy
tasks.command: if ! command -v run-clang-tidy >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "run-clang-tidy not found in PATH. Install clang-tidy and rerun."; exit 127; fi; files=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=d HEAD | grep 'src/.*\.cpp$'); if [ -z "$files" ]; then echo "No changed .cpp files to lint."; exit 0; fi; run-clang-tidy -p build -quiet $(echo $files | tr '\n' ' ')
